description: Input schema for travel encounter actions

action_schema.origin: string — starting location name or id
action_schema.destination: string — target location name or id
action_schema.forage: boolean — whether party is foraging during travel
action_schema.navigation_roll: number — Survival check result for off-road navigation (null if on road)
action_schema.encounter_roll: number — d20 roll for random encounter check
